objective: Decide whether the post-080 lane should advance into planning-only disjoint-scope simultaneous-worker pilot design or defer and remain one-worker-only.
decision_summary: Advance into planning-only disjoint-scope simultaneous-worker pilot design because Packet 078 published the decomposed apparatus, relay, and static-surfaces browser validation files and Packet 079 recorded conditional readiness for later disjoint-scope execution planning. This decision does not open simultaneous multi-worker execution.

rejected_options.reason: Deferral is not the smallest truthful next move because the specific Packet 070 validation-surface blocker has been resolved and planning can now define exact ownership and no-go rules without running execution.
